TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Cipuwa ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ikekami go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 279 buwan, 759 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 16% kyan ku 122 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 84% kyan ku 637 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 14%, Bunun 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cipuwa hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Cipuwa hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Cipuwa hya' ga Ku'ang sang go. tay mkraya' na Cipuwa hya' ga Hualien. tay 'llaw na Cipuwa hya' ga Kawaliwali. tay 'zil na Cipuwa hya' ga Ciataw. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Cipuwa ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨipuwa ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ikekami ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨipuwa ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨipuwa ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨipuwa ħjaʔ ɣa kuʔaŋ s~ɕaŋ ɣo. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨipuwa ħjaʔ ɣa ħualien. taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨipuwa ħjaʔ ɣa kawaliwali. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨipuwa ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiataw. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ʦ~ʨipuwa ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Cipuwa ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ikekami go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 279 buwan, 759 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 16% kyan ku 122 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 84% kyan ku 637 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 14%, Bunun 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cipuwa hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Cipuwa hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Cipuwa hya' ga Ku'ang sang go. tay mkraya' na Cipuwa hya' ga Hualien. tay 'llaw na Cipuwa hya' ga Kawaliwali. tay 'zil na Cipuwa hya' ga Ciataw. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Cipuwa ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨipuwa ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ikekami ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨipuwa ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨipuwa ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨipuwa ħjaʔ ɣa kuʔaŋ s~ɕaŋ ɣo. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨipuwa ħjaʔ ɣa ħualien. taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨipuwa ħjaʔ ɣa kawaliwali. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨipuwa ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiataw. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ʦ~ʨipuwa ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
